since_last: 57% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.20%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -2.56% · Gold +1.81% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 57% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.20%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.20%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.32%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at +5.92%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +5.92%, TER +5.33%, LRCX +5.27%, AMBA +5.27%, AMAT +5.01%. Laggards: DDOG -4.38%, WDAY -2.24%, HON -1.98%, NOW -1.60%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.88% at $163.42
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.88% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
